description: A client of retirement age needs to take their annual RMD from their IRA.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the client's RMD for the year based on their age and prior year-end account balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the required distribution amount.

nodes.task_description: Discuss tax withholding options with the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains the options, and the client elects to have federal taxes withheld.

nodes.task_description: Process the distribution from the client's IRA to their bank account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the withdrawal, less the specified tax withholding.
